notes: libpq.dll (PostgreSQL 17.5 SSL版) と PSqlGrid は自動でダウンロードされます。
pre_install: if((Test-Path("$env:TEMP\__scoop__preserved"))) { Write-Output "[pre_install] Removing temporary preserved folder"; Remove-Item "$env:TEMP\__scoop__preserved" -Recurse -Force }
Write-Output "[pre_install] Creating temporary preserved folder"; New-Item "$env:TEMP\__scoop__preserved" -type directory | Out-Null
post_install: Write-Output "[post_install] Overwriting from original files"; Copy-Item "$env:TEMP\__scoop__preserved\*" "$dir" -Recurse -Force
Write-Output "[post_install] Removing temporary preserved folder"; Remove-Item "$env:TEMP\__scoop__preserved" -Recurse -Force

if (!(Test-Path "$dir\libpq.dll")) { $libpqArch = 'w32'; if ([System.Environment]::Is64BitOperatingSystem) { $libpqArch = 'w64' }; $libpqDir = "libpq_REL_17_5_$libpqArch"; Write-Output "[post_install] Downloading libpq ($libpqArch)..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://code73.mydns.jp/a_ogawa/libpq/libpq_REL_17_5_$libpqArch.zip" -OutFile "$env:TEMP\libpq.zip"; Expand-Archive "$env:TEMP\libpq.zip" "$env:TEMP\libpq_extract" -Force; Copy-Item "$env:TEMP\libpq_extract\$libpqDir\*" "$dir" -Force; Remove-Item "$env:TEMP\libpq.zip" -Force; Remove-Item "$env:TEMP\libpq_extract" -Recurse -Force }

if ((Test-Path "$dir\psqlgrid.exe") -and (Get-Item "$dir\psqlgrid.exe").Length -lt 1024) { if ([System.Environment]::Is64BitOperatingSystem) { $pgUrl = 'https://code73.mydns.jp/a_ogawa/psqlgrid/psqlgrid_64_5001.zip'; $pgDir = 'psqlgrid_5_64' } else { $pgUrl = 'https://code73.mydns.jp/a_ogawa/psqlgrid/psqlgrid_32_4407.zip'; $pgDir = 'psqlgrid_4_32' }; Write-Output "[post_install] Downloading PSqlGrid..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $pgUrl -OutFile "$env:TEMP\psqlgrid.zip"; Expand-Archive "$env:TEMP\psqlgrid.zip" "$env:TEMP\psqlgrid_extract" -Force; Copy-Item "$env:TEMP\psqlgrid_extract\$pgDir\psqlgrid.exe" "$dir\psqlgrid.exe" -Force; Remove-Item "$env:TEMP\psqlgrid.zip" -Force; Remove-Item "$env:TEMP\psqlgrid_extract" -Recurse -Force }
